offer: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient route planning causes increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries. We provide automated route optimization instead of manual route planning and tracking.
problem: Inefficient route planning leading to increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on logistics tools
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Participate in community forums for logistics solutions
try_it: Let users try vehicle utilization monitoring and route optimization reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
